message:
refactor: Split multiprocessing.zig into modular directory structure

Split the 1373-line multiprocessing.zig into focused modules:
- process.zig (120 lines) - Process class
- pool.zig (149 lines) - Pool, AsyncResult, MapResult
- queues.zig (188 lines) - Queue, SimpleQueue, JoinableQueue
- connection.zig (83 lines) - Connection, Pipe
- sharedctypes.zig (91 lines) - Value, Array
- managers.zig (92 lines) - Manager, ManagedNamespace
- synchronize.zig (333 lines) - Lock, RLock, Condition, Semaphore, etc.
- multiprocessing.zig (321 lines) - Entry point with re-exports

This follows the CPython mirror convention where multiprocessing/
directory covers the corresponding CPython Lib/multiprocessing/ package.
